creator: david@olansa.co.uk
text:
I tried to log in to the forum using credentials dating back to 2018, as saved in my password vault. The login form said that no such user existed.

I then tried to create a new user against the same email address and submitted the form. A blank form was displayed again. There was no error message. No message was shown to the effect of 'your login has been created -- you'll be sent an email with a confirmation link'. No confirmation email was received either.

I'm opening a second bug with respect to the website contact form, as that didn't work either.
